title: TechCraft Homesteads 2
description: Modpack focused on Adventure, Tech and Homebuilding to play with your significant other or friends!
body:
New and improved modpack for playing with the wife and friends, equipped with in depth **Quest Line** hand crafted for long term playing with friends. Includes adventure, cooking, farming, home decoration and furniture mods, planes, ships and many quality of life mods! Includes some tech mods like AE2, Create Mod, Ad Astra and all of the YUNG's better mods and the [Let's Do] mods.

Add Essential mod for easily creating servers to **play together**! Or simply host on BisectHosting by removing just a couple client side mods.
